Off Calendar Mar-17-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall submit a proposed order to the Court in compliance with both CCP 437c(g) and CRC 3.1312.
